title: Discovery
description: Output contract for skills with output_schema=discovery. p0161d: lists independently-deployable / independently-callable components found in a repo, each evidenced by an entrypoint or deploy artefact. Drives BootstrapDispatch fan-out (one BootstrapRound per component).

name.description: Context-directory slug under .agentsmith/contexts/. Operator-readable, lowercase, no slashes.

workdir.description: Repo-relative working directory. "." for single-component repos.

language.description: Free-form language slug owned by the LLM (drives bootstrap-skill activation via project_language).

evidence.description: File path proving the component is deployable or callable (entrypoint or deploy artefact).

ambiguity.description: Populated when status=ambiguous. Names the conflicting candidates so the operator can re-run interactively for disambiguation.
